/usr/bin/c++  -g CMakeFiles/DCLP.dir/include/glad/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/DCLP.dir/include/stb_image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DCLP.dir/src/Image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DCLP.dir/src/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DCLP.dir/src/OSspecifics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DCLP.dir/src/Resources.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DCLP.dir/src/Saves.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DCLP.dir/src/States.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DCLP.dir/src/Text.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DCLP.dir/src/handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DCLP.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DCLP.dir/src/utils.cpp.o -o DCLP   -L/home/alex/Documents/opengl-dominion/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/alex/Documents/opengl-dominion/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so libimgui.a glfw/src/libglfw3.a -lfreetype -lrt -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so
